title: (Bp), Isof-134587168 (Ca), Isof-134587182 (Cf), Isof-134587323 (Cm), Isof-134587326 (Cr/Fi), Isof-134587340 (Bm), Isof-134587375 (Fc), Isof-134587333 (Fr), Isof-134587189 (Gl),
summary:
We are implementing filing CL-2025-OEND1.
Applicable LOBs: AG, BP, CA, CF, CM, CR, EB, FC, FR, GL, OP, PR
Effective Date: 2/1/2026
ANNOUNCEMENT
General announcement: The reimagined Verisk ISO Forms Library is now live, bringing you a powerful 
new way to interact with ISO® forms and FIRST Reports in one seamless experience. Try our new 
Forms Library!
NEW ISO PANELS HUB
As part of Verisk’s work to reimagine our Core Lines Services for the future, the Agenda & Minutes 
circular feature on ISOnet has been transformed into a user-friendly digital Panels experience.  The 
new experience will include the following features:  
An interactive digital experience with enhanced navigation  
Easy access to a Panels Hub to view your entitled panels content  
A panel-specific content search with targeted filters to better suit your business needs  
Ability to register for upcoming panel meetings (Coming Soon!) 
Agenda and related Minutes for each panel located in one location  
Easily learn about the history of specific panel topics through a panel item level view  
The new digital panel experience is now available for most major Lines of Business! 
If you have any questions or feedback regarding the new experience, please contact John Papa at 
John.Papa@verisk.com.

title: General Liability Loss Cost and Form Revision — Contractors and Habitational
recommendation: MODIFIED text for post-signoff invalidation test
summary: GL loss cost revision plus CG 00 01 12 26 form revision. Contractors and Habitational class groups are most affected; AL/GA/NC/SC/TN are in scope. Carrier action required for forms-counsel review.
key_message: ISO has revised PremOpsLossCost and the CG 00 01 Premises/Operations form. Contractors classes see +6.8% on average; Habitational +4.9%. Forms counsel should review proprietary overlay against ISO 12 26 edition.
iso_action: ISO will file rate revision and revised CG 00 01 12 26 form text in AL/GA/NC/SC/TN. Effective 2026-09-01 in approved states. ISO circular CL-2026-GL-014 issued 2026-05-15.
department_action: GA requires Prior Approval (rate change > 5% threshold). AL, NC, SC, TN accept File-and-Use. SERFF tracking numbers to be assigned upon filing.
company_action: Determine adoption position (adopt as filed / adopt with carrier-specific overlay / decline). Schedule forms-counsel review of CG 00 01 12 26 against proprietary endorsements. File with GA DOI by 2026-06-15 (Prior Approval lead time). Stage rating tables in PAS for 2026-09-01 effective date.
rating_software_impact: Rating software must stage updated PremOpsLossCost tables for AL/GA/NC/SC/TN. Add CG 00 01 12 26 as an available form edition. Configure conditional renewal-notice trigger for accounts with >10% premium change. Run full regression test of GL rating across all 5 states.
explanation_of_changes: ISO 12 26 broadens the defense obligation language in Section II(a) and adds attached structures to the habitational property exclusion in Section IV(j). Contractor exclusion language is clarified to limit scope to named insured. Three clauses identified with material change vs prior edition.

title: Illinois Commercial Package Policy — Advisory PMF Revision
recommendation: Adopt as filed; no carrier deviation needed for IL PMF advisory
summary: Illinois advisory Package Modification Factor (PMF) revision. Statewide +2.1%; Institutions +6.1% and Contractors +5.4% are the largest moves.
key_message: ISO is revising the advisory PMF table for the IL commercial package program. Carrier may adopt the advisory level or file its own deviation.

department_action: Illinois requires Prior Approval for any PMF deviation. SERFF filing required if carrier elects to adopt.
